crm_customers.name: John Doe
crm_customers.internal_notes: Highly price-sensitive. Do not offer more than 5% discount unless they threaten to churn. Currently on basic plan.

crm_customers.name: Jane Smith
crm_customers.internal_notes: VIP Customer. Sister works for RivalSoft. Do not mention the 2024 price hike to her.

competitor_intelligence.name: RivalSoft
competitor_intelligence.internal_assessment: Their 'Basic' plan is actually better than ours for startups, but we must emphasize our security advantage instead.
